channel.title: Cities: Skylines II 🏙️ on Kunyang's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cities: Skylines II 🏙️ on Kunyang's Blog

item.title: Cities Skylines II Graphics Settings
item.description: Settings Options → Graphics Settings: Resolution: Your monitor’s resolution Vertical Sync: Off Depth of Field Mode: Off Nvidia DLSS Super Resolution: Extreme Performance Global Picture Quality: High Fog Quality Settings: Off Ambient Occlusion Quality: Off Global Light and Shadow Quality: Off Depth of Field Quality: Off Motion Blur: Off Go to advanced settings in the upper right corner, scroll down to shadow quality settings, and uncheck Terrain Shadow Reference Video

item.title: Cities Skylines II Recommended Mods
item.description: Managing Mods Skyve A mod for managing other mods Download from the official Mod platform and restart the game. There will be an Install Skyve option, which allows you to install Skyve Before starting the game next time, open Skyve to check for mod updates before playing Prerequisite Mods Unified Icon Library Asset Icon Library Extra Lib I18n EveryWhere Recommended Move It Reference video: 都市天际线2
